name: Four-Layer Lemon Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together and pat into a pie pan.
2. Bake in a preheated 400°F oven until browned, 8 to 10 minutes.
3. Beat the remaining ingredients together and pour into the pie shell.
4. Chill.
5. Mix the thickened mixture until smooth and pour over the cream cheese layer.
6. Chill.
7. Cover the pie with whipped topping before serving time.
